title:

full_text:
Happy 6th Birthday to the U.S. Space Force! 🚀

As our newest military branch celebrates another year protecting America's interests in space, we recognize the engineering innovation that makes their mission possible.

From satellite communications to GPS systems, Space Force professionals are engineering the future of national security. SAME SF salutes the Guardians pioneering the next frontier of military engineering. 

Semper Supra! ⭐

full_text:
Happy 389th Birthday to the National Guard! 🎂

Since 1636, the Guard has stood ready to serve both community and country. From natural disaster response here in the Bay Area to overseas deployments, Guard members exemplify the dual mission of protecting our homeland while serving our neighbors.

SAME SF proudly recognizes the engineers, logistics specialists, and technical professionals in the National Guard who strengthen our infrastructure and enhance our community resilience every day.

title: The Holiday Gala is always more than a night out in the city. It’s a reminder...
full_text:
The Holiday Gala is always more than a night out in the city. It’s a reminder of why our Post exists and the purpose that connects our members, partners, and service community.

We heard from our incoming president, Scott MacCumbee, PE, who reflected on how gatherings like this return us to something simple and important: what it means to be human. The room held service members, industry partners, long-time members, and new faces — each one a part of the story that keeps SAME moving forward.

On

title: Our Holiday Gala brings the AEC community together each year, and our sponsor...
full_text:
Our Holiday Gala brings the AEC community together each year, and our sponsors are the reason the evening takes shape. Their support allows us to welcome friends, recognize students, and close the year on a high note.

They helped create a night where students could picture their path in the industry, members could reconnect, and our community could pause to celebrate the work we share. That support shows up not just on a banner, but in scholarships awarded and conversations that carry forward.

title: Today we pause to remember Pearl Harbor and honor the 2,400 Americans who los...
full_text:
Today we pause to remember Pearl Harbor and honor the 2,400 Americans who lost their lives on December 7, 1941. 

Their sacrifice reminds us that freedom is never free and that vigilance in defense of our nation remains our shared responsibility.

SAME SF stands with all who serve and have served, carrying forward the legacy of courage and commitment that defines our military community.

We remember. We honor. We never forget.

#PearlHarborRemembranceDay #HonorAndRemember #SAMESFPost #NeverForge

full_text:

The Gala is how we continue strengthening this work. If you have not registered yet, we welcome you to join us in supporting the next generation of engineers and public service leaders.

✅ Making sure everyone has an amazing day

Result? A seamless event that's raised thousands for Bay Area STEM scholarships.

August 29 at Blue Rock Springs: Want to be part of the magic behind the scenes?
💡 Volunteer with us: DM for opportunities
 🎟️ Join as a player: https://lnkd.in/gfQCHwWi
 ⏰ Early bird ends August 1

title: 🌟 It's Member Appreciation Week, and we couldn't be more grateful for our inc...
full_text:

To our incredible SAME SF members: Thank you for your service, expertise, and commitment to strengthening Bay Area infrastructure and resilience. 
From our veterans and active-duty personnel to our engineers and public sector leaders, you make our community stronger every day.

Don't miss the exciting opportunities SAME National is offering this week, including chances to win Marriott Bonvoy

title: #ThrowbackThursday to Fort Point. Built in 1861, Fort Point was an engineerin...
full_text:
#ThrowbackThursday to Fort Point. Built in 1861, Fort Point was an engineering marvel of its time strategically positioned at the edge of the Golden Gate to defend the Bay. With arched masonry, granite foundations, and over 100 cannons, it set the standard for 19th-century military infrastructure.

📍 Before it was a national landmark, it was a symbol of defense, precision, and civil–military infrastructure at scale.

📊 Swipe through to explore how this iconic structure shaped Bay Area defense an

title: ⛳ Bay Area engineers, veterans, and community leaders, let’s tee up for impac...
full_text:
⛳ Bay Area engineers, veterans, and community leaders, let’s tee up for impact!

Our Annual SAME SF Golf Tournament is coming up on August 29 in Vallejo, and now’s the perfect time to save your spot.

This isn’t your average golf day. It’s where A/E/C professionals connect, give back, and help fund the next generation of STEM leaders, all while enjoying a beautiful course and great company.

title:
Today we celebrate the birth of our nation and the freedoms we hold dear.

On...
full_text:
Today we celebrate the birth of our nation and the freedoms we hold dear.

On July 4th, 1776, our founders declared independence with courage and vision. That same spirit of service, sacrifice, and dedication to something greater than ourselves continues to inspire the engineers, service members, and public servants in our community today.

From all of us at SAME SF: Happy Independence Day! May we never forget the price of freedom and those who defend it. 🇺🇸

#IndependenceDay #July4th #MilitaryA

Put your skills to the test at SAME SF Post's Annual Golf Tournament on Friday, August 29, at Blue Rock Springs Golf Course in Vallejo, CA!

title: As June winds down, we’re reminded of what powers everything at SAME SF: our ...
full_text:
As June winds down, we’re reminded of what powers everything at SAME SF: our volunteers. 🙌

From our AI + Construction panel to ongoing STEM efforts and member-led events, June was full of impact, and it was all possible because of those who stepped up and led.

⛳ Now we’re gearing up for our annual golf tournament on August 29, and July is the time to jump in. Whether you want to help coordinate sponsors or greet players on event day, there’s a place for you.

💬 Ready to get involved? Drop a co

title: What a night! The “Technology & The Future of Work” event brought together in...
full_text:
What a night! The “Technology & The Future of Work” event brought together innovators across A/E/C to explore how AI is reshaping our industry.

💡 One key theme: while safety, accuracy, and risk remain priorities in the AI space, the construction sector is embracing the potential of AI for efficiency, autonomy, and innovation.

We also had a forward-thinking conversation around how to bring the Department of Defense to the table, ensuring public–private collaboration keeps pace with technologica

title: Big conversations ahead today at “Technology & The Future of Work” but first,...
full_text:
Big conversations ahead today at “Technology & The Future of Work” but first, a word of thanks.

SAME SF extends our heartfelt appreciation to our event sponsors, whose support makes this dialogue possible. From military readiness to infrastructure resilience, the future of engineering demands forward-thinking minds and it starts with events like these.

Whether you’re tuning in for insights or networking with fellow innovators, we’re glad you’re with us. 

👏 Thank you to: AST Builders Inc, Nirm

title: 🌍 Today on International Women in Engineering Day, we’re celebrating women wh...
full_text:
🌍 Today on International Women in Engineering Day, we’re celebrating women who are shaping the built world and the systems that power it, from defense infrastructure to space missions.

Whether designing military facilities, leading civil works at USACE, or advancing aerospace at NASA, these engineers aren’t just breaking barriers, they’re building the future.

Their stories show young girls (and all of us) what’s possible.

Let’s keep opening doors, mentoring forward, and making space for more.

title: SAME National President, Michael D. Huffstetler, Assoc AIA, LEED AP, F.SAME, ...
full_text:
SAME National President, Michael D. Huffstetler, Assoc AIA, LEED AP, F.SAME, shares a powerful reminder: our mission is collective and local action matters.

At SAME SF, we carry that mission forward by strengthening connections between the Bay Area’s A/E/C community and public-sector partners. From STEM scholarships to joint agency events, our volunteers help “Build the Bond” right here at home.

Watch National President Huffstetler’s message and see how SAME’s national vision aligns with the w

title: 🛠️ Today we recognize the legacy and impact of the U.S. Army Corps of Enginee...
full_text:
🛠️ Today we recognize the legacy and impact of the U.S. Army Corps of Engineers (USACE).

Since 1775, USACE has led with purpose abroad and at home; building critical infrastructure, maintaining navigation, delivery civilian works projects, and supporting national defense missions across the globe.

At SAME SF Post, we’re proud to work alongside current and former USACE professionals who continue to shape resilient, innovative communities here in the Bay Area and beyond.

SAME SF Post salutes the engineers, leaders, and service members who continue to shape our nation with strength and purpose. We’re proud to stand alongside you in service and partnership.

title:
🎉 Thrilled to share some incredible news from the #SanFranciscoPost! 

Please...
full_text:
🎉 Thrilled to share some incredible news from the #SanFranciscoPost! 

Please join us in congratulating LT Kiera Hollenbeck, PE, CEU Oakland, on receiving the 2024 Society of American Military Engineers (SAME) Oren Medal—one of the organization’s highest honors. 🏅

Why LT Hollenbeck stands out
	•	ATON & Dredge Program Manager for 1,900+ aids to navigation worth $169 M across WA, OR & CA.
	•	Streamlined the ATON CASREP procurement process—delivering 25 % cost savings and a rapid $273 K contract t
